response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of professional C++ exposure (National Instruments, 2014-2015) plus an academic project, far short of the 5-10 years required. Primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and JavaScript on web/mobile/embedded stacks. No SQL Server or Oracle experience (MongoDB, MySQL only), no Windows-platform focus, and no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain background. RIDE Capital tenure was fintech-adjacent but used Node/GraphQL, not the financial-product engineering this role requires.
strengths: Broad senior-level engineering experience across multiple stacks and domains
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Exposure to high-throughput, low-latency systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months) and over a decade old, versus 5-10 years required
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; databases used are MongoDB and MySQL
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: Missing Fixed Income / Capital Markets domain
